import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let line2 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut cur = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(line1)
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line1, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9
      if not string.is_empty(cur)
        let v = match string.parse_int(cur)
        when Some(x)
          x
        when None
          0
        end
        nums = list.push(nums, v)
        cur = ""
      end
    else
      cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(cur)
    let v = match string.parse_int(cur)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    nums = list.push(nums, v)
  end

  let target = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end

  mut lo = 0
  mut hi = list.len(nums) - 1
  mut found = -1
  while lo <= hi and found == -1
    let mid = (lo + hi) / 2
    let v = match list.get(nums, mid)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if v == target
      found = mid
    else if v < target
      lo = mid + 1
    else
      hi = mid - 1
    end
  end

  if found == -1
    print("not_found")
  else
    print("index=#{found}")
  end
end
